data.title: Donald Trump Pushes Tariffs On Chinese Cars In Detroit Visit, Vows To Revamp Industry
data.description: Trump focuses on economy, tariffs on Chinese cars and corporate tax cuts in Detroit Economic Club speech. Promises to revive U.S. auto industry.

data.title: Delta Air Lines Lags Q3 Earnings Estimates
data.description: Delta Air Lines (NYSE: DAL) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.50 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.56 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.03 per share a year ago. These figures are adjusted for non-recurring items.

data.title: DeSantis Rejects Voter Registration Extension During Hurricane Milton Evacuations; Cannabis Companies Close Operations
data.description: DeSantis said Monday 'there's nothing inhibiting you from registering' as widespread Hurricane Milton evacuations were underway.
